title: myosotis sylvatica subsp. alpestris
intro: Myosotis sylvatica subsp. alpestris is a subspecies of the annual forget-me-not, a type of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, as well as offering antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Myosotis sylvatica subsp. alpestris is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture for herbal remedies, often used to treat various health issues, including respiratory and skin problems.
